channel.title: Kaynos Help Center — What's New
channel.description: Updates and improvements to Kaynos — video review for coaches.

item.title: April 2026 — Help center refresh
item.description: Improved search, keyboard shortcuts, print styles, accessibility improvements, Developer API docs, and interactive troubleshooting tools.

item.title: March 2026 — Video playback and upload improvements
item.description: Keyboard shortcuts during playback, timeline note markers, playback speed controls, chunked parallel upload with retry, real-time upload speed display.
